name: ELECTRONIC ARTS INC.
summary: Electronic Arts (EA) is a global digital interactive entertainment company that develops, markets, publishes, and delivers games, content, and services playable on consoles, PCs, and mobile devices. Key franchises include EA SPORTS FC, Madden NFL, EA SPORTS College Football, The Sims, Apex Legends, and Battlefield. Live services, including Ultimate Team extra content and subscriptions, represented 73% of total net revenue in fiscal year 2025.
